content:
@everyone

Starpath is LIVE!

The Star Atlas referral program, Starpath, is NOW LIVE!

Enjoy unmatched benefits, including:

 Receiving 25% of the amount referees spend on primary sales
 Receiving 25% of our share of the fee during secondary sales
 Referees receiving 10% primary sales for 90 days
 For the duration of the Golden Ticket event in SAGE Labs, every $500 USDC equivalent of value transacted will also award the referrer 1 Golden Ticket to enter into drawings.

Note: Once you create a referral link, you're no longer eligible to be referred by anyone.

Create a referral link in your play.staratlas.com profile NOW!  

 | https://play.staratlas.com/
